title: agrostis olympica
intro: Agrostis olympica, also known as the Olympic bentgrass or Olympic grass, is a type of grass species that belongs to the Poaceae family. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. Agrostis olympica is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, treating respiratory issues, and soothing digestive problems. The plant is often prepared into teas, infusions, and decoctions for use in herbal remedies, although more research is needed to fully understand its potential uses.
